title: binaria sprucei
intro: Binaria sprucei, also known as Wild Senna, is a plant species that belongs to the Fabaceae family, characterized by its yellow flowers and pods. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to act as a laxative and to treat various gastrointestinal issues. The health benefits of Binaria sprucei include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and providing relief from constipation and other bowel problems. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and pods are typically used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
